data.body: Certified PASS advisory disposition: f96e73233ac9a9a4d accepted as an operational rollback invariant—pause re-sign as well as compact for the downgrade window because old v2 readers ignore additive phase fields; document this with the other rollback steps. fbdeb765231828bec is already covered by the explicitly named tests/unit/test_plan_review_phase_reducer.py command, whose description includes rollback precision behavior; no extra file is needed. fd81c8cf85201e941 is inapplicable because plan reviews are synchronous and there is no cross-version in-flight workflow payload; gate_dispatch legacy absence handling is defense-in-depth. fb59727dfac76fbbf/f607dd457c67f9209 are non-blocking size/style diagnostics for a cohesive phase-plus-atomic-signing protocol. fb687356588601a04 is deliberately resolved by the accepted documented bootstrap precision loss rather than adding fsck scope. f009ca35a68ba943c is declined: the user explicitly approved a fixed non-configurable 0.80 policy with code rollback as removal mechanism. f77836e85c31843cd maps relationship and related-fingerprint directly to PlanRelationSnapshot relationship sets and related_material fields. f686d2afb53de54e6 is declined because the named immutable generation type makes equality and retry invariants reviewable across all three signing paths. fa50cb802e329b7b7 accepted for implementation: define one EXECUTION_REVIEW_PRIORITY_FLOOR=0.80 protocol constant and use it for manifest, Pass-3, sidecar, and validity comparisons. No signed material change is required.
